title: Sands of Time
description: A mod that improves the overall game in an unexpected way. Consistency through sand.
body:
A mod that improves the game and adds in continuity using you guessed it sand.
features:
- full soul sand blockset
- full moon sand blockset
- sandy soil of all variants
- quicksand of all variants
- sandstorms for mesa and desert
- full sandy armor set
- the smoldered a missing link in the minecraft lore
- the sandwyrm a combanation of all the mobs from the phantom mob vote into one abomanation

Q&A
Why is the audio so bad?
I don't have fancy recording stuff.
Can I use it in a modpack?
Absolutely.
Can I copy it?
No.
Can you port it to...
No but, I will port it to 1.21 and newer versions.
Why is the code so bad?
My first mod :)

NEEDS GECKOLIB
